title: mouthwatering crispy mexican chicken tacos
description: crispy fried chicken in a taco shell, topped with fresh cilantro, diced tomatoes, and a squeeze of lime juice.
instructions: heat the sunflower oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat to 350°F.
in a large bowl, whisk together cumin, paprika, salt, and pepper.
add the chicken pieces to the bowl and toss to coat with the spice mixture.
fry the chicken in batches until golden brown and cooked through, about 5-7 minutes.
drain the chicken on paper towels.
in the same skillet, cook the diced onion and bell pepper until softened, about 3-4 minutes.
add the minced garlic and cook for an additional minute.
warm the tortillas by wrapping them in a damp paper towel and microwaving for 20-30 seconds.
assemble the tacos by placing a few pieces of fried chicken onto a warmed tortilla, followed by some of the cooked onion and bell pepper mixture.
squeeze a sliver of lime juice on top and sprinkle with cilantro.
